title: crepidomanes teysmannii
intro: Crepidomanes teysmannii, also known as the Tysmann's creeping fern or Tysmann's filmy fern, is a species of filmy fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Crepidomanes teysmannii include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, making it a popular herb in folk medicine. Crepidomanes teysmannii is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, where the dried plant material is steeped in hot water to release its active compounds.
